iotfleetwise.campaign.conditionbasedcoll: Information about a collection scheme that uses a simple logical expression to recognize what data to collect.

iotfleetwise.campaign.conditionbasedcoll.Description: (Optional) Specifies the version of the conditional expression language.
The logical expression used to recognize what data to collect. For example, `$variable.Vehicle.OutsideAirTemperature >= 105.0`.
(Optional) The minimum duration of time between two triggering events to collect data, in milliseconds.  If a signal changes often, you might want to collect data at a slower rate.

(Optional) Whether to collect data for all triggering events (`ALWAYS`). Specify (`RISING_EDGE`), or specify only when the condition first evaluates to false. For example, triggering on "AirbagDeployed"; Users aren't interested on triggering when the airbag is already exploded; they only care about the change from not deployed => deployed.
